arts.ttl: Southampton, West Ham United to battle for 17-goal striker in January window?
arts.sum: Southampton and West Ham United are reportedly in the race for Corinthians striker Yuri Alberto, who will be allowed to leave the Brazilian club in January.

arts.ttl: Lopetegui on Brentford, Anfield positives and aiming for improvement
arts.sum: It’s not easy to say after this kind of loss, but it's true that we did very good things for 75 minutes at Liverpool on Wednesday night. The truth is that we did good things on Wednesday against a very big team, but we know that we have to improve.
